query: Water is dripping from my bathroom ceiling and the ceiling has a brown stain.
notes: Ceiling leak from bathroom area should retrieve the prior ceiling leak ticket.

query: My kitchen faucet keeps dripping and will not shut off all the way.
notes: Kitchen faucet drip should retrieve the faucet cartridge leak ticket.

query: The AC is blowing warm air and the apartment is very hot.
notes: Warm-air AC issue should retrieve the refrigerant leak HVAC ticket.

query: I smell burning near my electrical panel and see dark scorch marks.
notes: Burning smell near electrical panel should retrieve the critical electrical ticket.

query: There are cockroaches in my kitchen near the refrigerator and sink.
notes: Cockroach complaint should retrieve the kitchen pest-control ticket.

query: My apartment door lock is broken and I cannot secure the front door.
notes: Broken lock/security issue should retrieve the front door lock ticket.

query: The refrigerator stopped cooling and my food is starting to spoil.
notes: Refrigerator cooling issue should retrieve the compressor relay appliance ticket.

query: Gas smell is coming from the stove area even after I turned it off.
notes: Stove gas smell should retrieve the prior gas leak appliance ticket.

query: I found bedbugs and I wake up with small bites on my arms.
notes: Bedbug report should retrieve the heat-treatment pest ticket.

query: Water is flooding from under my bathroom sink and pooling on the floor.
notes: Bathroom sink flooding should retrieve the burst supply line plumbing ticket.
